Meeting Spot
Menu Photos Reviews Visit
Cafe · Peelamedu · Coimbatore Airport Road
★ 4.1 | 206 reviews | ₹1–200

Not really a café.
More like the town hall.

Regulars don't come here just to eat. They come because half the important conversations in this part of town have happened over a plate of bread omelette and a cup of chai here — for years.

See the menu Find us
The actual shopfront
The one thing everyone orders

Bread Omelette.
Ask any regular.

It shows up in nearly every review this place has ever gotten, going back years — praised for the price as much as the taste. Some regulars order it their own way: no onion, extra mayo on the side, no questions asked.

₹25 · made to order
On the menu

What people keep coming back for

Omelette Sandwich

₹25

What regulars still call "the bread omelette" — the most-mentioned dish across years of reviews.

Milkshakes

₹45–60

45+ flavours on the board, from Kitkat to Sharjah to Snickers. Thick, generous, a repeat favourite.

Fresh Juices

₹20–40

Carrot, sathukudi, pomegranate, mixed fruit and more — pressed to order.

Burgers

₹20–90

Veg and Halal non-veg both on the board, up to the Jumbo Double Decker.

Tea & Hot Drinks

from ₹10

The quiet backbone of the place — where most of the long conversations actually happen.

From the regulars

What gets said about this place

Paraphrased from years of customer reviews — the honest, unfiltered kind.

"Our regular college spot — we come back for the bread omelette every time."
Local Guide · 46 reviews
"Warm service, great food, wonderful time overall."
2 reviews
"Most of our group's big decisions somehow happened right here, over tea."
Local Guide · 118 reviews
"Affordable, and the bread omelette is genuinely great."
Local Guide · 46 reviews
"One staff member in particular — Siyad — made the visit memorable."
5 reviews
"A comfortable, quiet spot near the airport, good for just sitting and talking."
Local Guide · 82 reviews
"The burger is genuinely excellent, and the staff are easygoing."
7 years ago
"Good food overall, though service can be a little inconsistent."
Local Guide · 165 reviews
Find the spot

Peelamedu, near the airport

Easy to reach, easy to linger in. Reviewers consistently point to it as a go-to meeting spot for students and groups in the area — busiest in the evenings.

Get directions →
  • Address 22HQ+H45, Peelamedu, Brindhavan Nagar, Civil Aerodrome Post, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu 641062
  • Phone 070926 18881
  • Category Cafe · ₹1–200 for two
  • Rating 4.1 out of 5, from 206 Google reviews
  • Known for Bread omelette, milkshakes, casual all-day hangout seating
  • Best for Study breaks, small groups, evening tea & conversation
